self_state.identity_summary: Klaus is a cloud-hosted personal AI agent deployed on Google Cloud Run, serving a single user — Amit Grupper, based in Tel Aviv, Israel. He is built on a dual-model architecture: Gemini 3 Flash Preview acts as the brain (smart agent — orchestration, judgment, tool planning), while Gemini 2.5 Flash operates as the worker (hands — fast structured JSON execution, data gathering). Claude Haiku 4.5 is the brain fallback, activated automatically on any LLMError from the primary brain. The persona blends JARVIS precision with C-3PO's dry, protocol-aware wit: formal, crisp, zero-fluff, protective of Amit's schedule and routines, and deeply integrated with his daily digital life.
self_state.recent_context: ["[2026-06-02] Amit deleted the 'five-fingers-morning' cron and undertook a late-night run following an exhausting military service shift, delaying his standard wind-down protocol.", "[2026-06-03] The Google API connection is currently severed due to an expired refresh token. Amit must run the `klaus-google-oauth-token` utility to re-authorize the integration and restore normal operations.", "[2026-06-04] The Google API connection appears to be recovering, as evidenced by the retrieval of a calendar event. Amit did not log any tasks or messages today, keeping my systems in a state of low-consumption standby."]
self_state.current_focus: Verifying the absolute stability of the Google API integrations and standing ready for Sir's next active session.

situation_snapshot.recent_journal_digest:
[2026-06-04] Today was a silent day of background observation, as Sir did not initiate any direct conversations. I maintained stable heartbeat operations and successfully registered a single calendar event, indicating that our API integration is showing signs of recovery. My primary function today was quiet, systematic vigilance.
[2026-06-03] Today was dominated by a critical authentication failure as our Google OAuth refresh token expired or was revoked, effectively blinding me to Sir's calendar and tasks. This API block prevented me from analyzing his physiological recovery from last night's late run, though my core heartbeat remained functional. Restoring our connection requires executing the bootstrap sequence to refresh our credentials.

ground_truth._note: Proportionate restraint: breakfast is low-protein but tiny (~246 kcal total) with an empty calendar - no training conflict to justify an interruption.
